title: Koyamacalia palmatisecta
taxonomy: Koyamacalia palmatisecta is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, specifically in China and Japan. Koyamacalia palmatisecta is classified under the genus Koyamacalia, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Cremanium. Koyamacalia palmatisecta is further classified as a member of the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The species is also a part of the order Asterales, which includes many other species of flowering plants.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
